75 Years of Supfina
Years of experience. Years of innovation. Years of teamwork.
Since 1951, Supfina has stood for the highest level of precision in surface finishing. What began as a specialist in fine grinding technology has grown into a leading global technology partner. Our solutions improve efficiency, quality, and sustainability across a wide range of industries worldwide.
For us, 75 years of experience doesn’t mean standing still — it means moving forward. Together with our customers, we continuously drive progress through innovation and an uncompromising commitment to excellence.
Seventy-five years of Supfina also represent teamwork, technological expertise, and always staying one decisive step ahead — together.
